text: Bitcoin and Ethereum are both down roughly 2.5–3% over the past day, with altcoins declining more steeply, signaling a broad-based pullback across risk assets. The Fear & Greed index at 14 reflects extreme fear conditions, though the slight 7-day uptick suggests sentiment may be stabilizing rather than deteriorating further. Bitcoin dominance holding steady at 56% and volume remaining substantial at $77B indicate this is a measured correction rather than panic liquidation.
